items.title: The Housemaid'S Wedding
items.author: Freida McFadden
items.synopsis_short: Someone may use deadly means to…
items.synopsis_full: Someone may use deadly means to keep a wedding that is to take place in a few hours from happening.

items.title: Revolution
items.author: Eric Metaxas
items.synopsis_full: The author of “Martin Luther” and “Bonhoeffer” gives an account of the foundation of the United States of America. Read by the author. 26 hours, 47 minutes unabridged.

items.author: Dav Pilkey
items.synopsis_short: Best friends George and Harold make…
items.synopsis_full: Best friends George and Harold make a manga about their superhero creation.

items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen, Vol. 30
items.author: Gege Akutami
items.synopsis_short: In the final volume of this…
items.synopsis_full: In the final volume of this series, will Itadori end the battle with Sukuna once and for all?

items.title: The Art Thief
items.author: Michael Finkel
items.synopsis_full: The author of “The Stranger in the Woods” tells the story of Stéphane Breitwieser, who stole art more than 200 times for the sake of admiring it.

items.title: The Greatest Sentence Ever Written
items.author: Walter Isaacson
items.synopsis_short: The historian and biographer examines the…
items.synopsis_full: The historian and biographer examines the concepts of a statement found in the Declaration of Independence.

items.title: London Falling
items.author: Patrick Radden Keefe
items.synopsis_full: The author of “Say Nothing” details the efforts by the parents of a 19-year-old Londoner to uncover the truth about his mysterious death and secret life. Read by the author. 13 hours unabridged.

items.title: Todo Sobre el Amor
items.author: bell hooks
items.synopsis_short: The deceased feminist icon explores the…
items.synopsis_full: The deceased feminist icon explores the causes of a polarized society and the meaning of love.

items.title: Investigators: Weather Or Not
items.author: John Patrick Green
items.synopsis_short: Mango and Brash, along with some…
items.synopsis_full: Mango and Brash, along with some feline agents, look into what is causing the rain to turn green and the city’s water supply to become milk.
